case_title: CHERI HILL VS. LELA M. HILL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY HILL, CHERI AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, LELA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, CHERI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, CHERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HILL, LELA M. THE TESTIMONY PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
